empty.example: The empty classroom was silent after all the students left.
empty.exampleCn: 所有学生离开后，空荡的教室一片寂静。

basic.example: Learning basic manners is the first step toward becoming a good person.
basic.exampleCn: 学习基本礼仪是成为好人的第一步。

teenage.example: Teenage years are a time of learning, growing, and discovering yourself.
teenage.exampleCn: 青少年时期是学习、成长和发现自我的时光。

behave.example: Always behave politely when you are a guest in someone's home.
behave.exampleCn: 当你在别人的家里做客时，总是要表现得有礼貌。

gradually.example: Her English improved gradually after months of daily practice.
gradually.exampleCn: 经过数月的每日练习，她的英语逐渐提高了。

be relaxed about.example: My parents are relaxed about my hobbies as long as I study well.
be relaxed about.exampleCn: 只要我学习好，我父母对我的爱好很放松。

drop by.example: Feel free to drop by my house whenever you want to chat.
drop by.exampleCn: 随时欢迎你来我家聊天。

after all.example: You should forgive him; after all, he is still young and learning.
after all.exampleCn: 你应该原谅他，毕竟他还年轻，还在学习。

get mad.example: Do not get mad at small mistakes; help fix them instead.
get mad.exampleCn: 不要对小错误生气，而是帮忙改正它们。

go out of one's way.example: She went out of her way to help the new student find his classroom.
go out of one's way.exampleCn: 她格外努力地帮助新学生找到他的教室。

make an effort.example: If you make an effort every day, progress will surely follow.
make an effort.exampleCn: 如果你每天作出努力，进步肯定会随之而来。

be expected to do.example: Students are expected to do their homework on time every day.
be expected to do.exampleCn: 学生理应每天按时做作业。

be supposed to do.example: You are supposed to do your best, no matter what the result is.
be supposed to do.exampleCn: 无论结果如何，你都应该尽最大努力。

to one's surprise.example: To my surprise, the shy girl gave an excellent speech.
to one's surprise.exampleCn: 令我惊讶的是，这个害羞的女孩做了一次出色的演讲。

take off.example: The plane will take off in ten minutes; please fasten your seatbelt.
take off.exampleCn: 飞机将在十分钟后起飞，请系好安全带。

get used to.example: It took me a while to get used to waking up early.
get used to.exampleCn: 我花了一段时间才习惯早起。

make mistakes.example: Do not be afraid to make mistakes; they are the best teachers.
make mistakes.exampleCn: 不要害怕犯错误，它们是最好的老师。

be comfortable doing sth.example: She is comfortable doing sth new because she loves challenges.
be comfortable doing sth.exampleCn: 她轻松自如地做新事情，因为她喜欢挑战。

mad.example: My dog gets mad when strangers come too close to our house.
mad.exampleCn: 当陌生人离我们家太近时，我的狗会生气。

It is.example: It is important to stay calm when facing difficult problems.
It is.exampleCn: 面对困难问题时保持冷静很重要。

rather.example: The weather today is rather cold, so wear a warm coat.
rather.exampleCn: 今天天气相当冷，所以穿一件暖和的外套。

power.example: The power of kindness can change someone's whole day.
power.exampleCn: 善良的力量可以改变某人的一整天。

pale.example: He looked pale after running five kilometers without stopping.
pale.exampleCn: 不停地跑了五公里后，他看起来脸色惨白。

wealth.example: True wealth is not money but the love of family and friends.
wealth.exampleCn: 真正的财富不是金钱，而是家人和朋友的爱。

weight.example: The weight of responsibility grows as we become adults.
weight.exampleCn: 随着我们成年，责任的重量也在增长。

besides.example: Besides English, she can also speak French and Japanese.
besides.exampleCn: 除了英语，她还会说法语和日语。

fault.example: Admitting your fault is the first step to becoming better.
fault.exampleCn: 承认你的错误是变得更好的第一步。

lately.example: Lately, I have been reading more books about science and nature.
lately.exampleCn: 最近，我一直在读更多关于科学和自然的书。

friendship.example: True friendship grows stronger through both joy and hardship.
friendship.exampleCn: 真正的友谊通过欢乐和艰辛变得更加牢固。

banker.example: The honest banker returned the extra money to the customer.
banker.exampleCn: 这位诚实的银行家把多出来的钱还给了顾客。

fame.example: Some people seek fame, but most just want a happy life.
fame.exampleCn: 有些人追求名声，但大多数人只想要幸福的生活。

examine.example: The doctor will examine your eyes to check your vision.
examine.exampleCn: 医生会检查你的眼睛以检查视力。

lemon.example: A slice of lemon in water makes a refreshing summer drink.
lemon.exampleCn: 水中放一片柠檬可以做成清爽的夏日饮品。

uncomfortable.example: Wearing tight shoes all day can make your feet uncomfortable.
uncomfortable.exampleCn: 整天穿 tight 的鞋子会让你的脚不舒服。

goal.example: My goal this year is to read at least twenty good books.
goal.exampleCn: 我今年目标是至少读二十本好书。

courage.example: It takes courage to stand up for what is right.

relief.example: I felt great relief when I heard the good news.
relief.exampleCn: 当我听到好消息时，我感到极大的轻松。

agreement.example: After much discussion, we finally reached an agreement.
agreement.exampleCn: 经过多次讨论，我们最终达成了一致。

disappoint.example: Do not disappoint those who believe in you and support you.
disappoint.exampleCn: 不要让那些相信你和支持你的人失望。

would rather.example: I would rather walk in the park than stay indoors all day.
would rather.exampleCn: 我宁愿在公园里散步，也不愿整天待在室内。

drive sb. crazy.example: The loud music from next door drives me crazy every night.
drive sb. crazy.exampleCn: 隔壁的 loud 音乐每晚都让我发疯。

the more...the more.example: The more you read, the more you understand about the world.
the more...the more.exampleCn: 你读得越多，你对世界的理解就越深。

be friends with sb.example: I am proud to be friends with someone as kind as her.
be friends with sb.exampleCn: 我很自豪能和像她这样善良的人做朋友。

leave out.example: Do not leave out anyone when you invite friends to the party.
leave out.exampleCn: 邀请朋友参加聚会时，不要遗漏任何人。

to start with.example: To start with, let me introduce myself to all of you.
to start with.exampleCn: 首先，让我向你们所有人介绍我自己。

kick sb. Off.example: The coach decided to kick him off the team for breaking the rules.
kick sb. Off.exampleCn: 教练决定因他违反规则而把他开除出队。

be hard on sb.example: Do not be too hard on yourself when you make a small mistake.
be hard on sb.exampleCn: 当你犯小错误时，不要对自己太严厉。

rather than.example: I chose to walk rather than take the bus to enjoy the scenery.
rather than.exampleCn: 我选择步行而不是乘公交车来欣赏风景。

pull together.example: If we pull together, we can finish this difficult task on time.
pull together.exampleCn: 如果我们齐心协力，我们可以按时完成这项困难的任务。

call in.example: The manager decided to call in all workers for an important meeting.
call in.exampleCn: 经理决定召集所有工人参加一个重要会议。

have sth in common.example: My best friend and I have a lot in common, like music and sports.
have sth in common.exampleCn: 我最好的朋友和我有很多共同之处，比如音乐和运动。

be close to doing sth.example: We are close to doing sth great if we keep working hard.
be close to doing sth.exampleCn: 如果我们继续努力工作，我们快要做成伟大的事情了。

put pressure on sb.example: Parents should not put too much pressure on their children.
put pressure on sb.exampleCn: 父母不应该对孩子施加太多压力。

hand back.example: The teacher will hand back our exam papers tomorrow morning.
hand back.exampleCn: 老师明天早上会发还我们的试卷。

for no reason.example: He left the room for no reason, which made everyone confused.
for no reason.exampleCn: 他无缘无故地离开了房间，这让每个人都感到困惑。

drive V.example: Curiosity can drive us to explore places we have never been.
drive V.exampleCn: 好奇心可以驱使我们探索从未去过的地方。

nod.example: She nodded politely when the teacher explained the new rule.
nod.exampleCn: 当老师解释新规则时，她礼貌地点了点头。

have sth.example: Having a good habit can help you succeed in the long run.
have sth.exampleCn: 拥有一个好习惯可以帮助你长远地取得成功。

be proud of.example: We are all proud of our country's rich history and culture.
be proud of.exampleCn: 我们都为我们国家丰富的历史和文化感到骄傲。

have trouble.example: If you have trouble with math, ask your teacher for help.
have trouble.exampleCn: 如果你在数学上有困难，请向老师求助。

be tired of.example: I am tired of eating the same food every day at school.
be tired of.exampleCn: 我厌倦了每天在学校吃同样的食物。

be angry with.example: She was angry with her brother for breaking her favorite cup.
be angry with.exampleCn: 她因弟弟打破了她最喜欢的杯子而生气。

in surprise.example: He looked at me in surprise when I told him the news.
in surprise.exampleCn: 当我告诉他这个消息时，他惊讶地看着我。

keep up.example: Keep up the good work, and you will surely improve.
keep up.exampleCn: 保持好工作，你一定会进步。

keep one's word.example: A person who keeps one's word is respected by everyone.
keep one's word.exampleCn: 一个守信的人会受到每个人的尊重。

make a face.example: The baby made a face when he tasted the sour lemon.
make a face.exampleCn: 婴儿尝到酸柠檬时做了个鬼脸。

be strict with sb.example: My parents are strict with me because they want me to succeed.
be strict with sb.exampleCn: 我父母对我要求严格，因为他们想让我成功。

stop sb. From doing sth.example: Nothing can stop you from doing sth you truly love.
stop sb. From doing sth.exampleCn: 没有什么能阻止你做你真正喜欢的事情。

allow sb. to do sth.example: The school allows students to do sth creative during art week.
allow sb. to do sth.exampleCn: 学校允许学生在艺术周做有创意的事情。

ask sb. to do sth.example: The teacher asked us to do sth helpful for our community.
ask sb. to do sth.exampleCn: 老师要求我们为社区做一些有益的事情。

I believe that.example: I believe that honesty is the foundation of all good relationships.
I believe that.exampleCn: 我确信诚实是所有良好关系的基础。

unexpected.example: The unexpected rain brought cool air to the hot summer day.
unexpected.exampleCn: 突如其来的雨给炎热的夏日带来了凉爽的空气。

worker.example: Every worker deserves respect for their hard work and dedication.
worker.exampleCn: 每个工人都应该因其努力和奉献而受到尊重。

alive.example: The forest comes alive with birdsong every spring morning.
alive.exampleCn: 每个春天的早晨，森林因鸟鸣而充满生机。

cream.example: I put some cream in my coffee to make it taste smoother.
cream.exampleCn: 我在咖啡里加了一些奶油，让它口感更顺滑。

discovery.example: The discovery of ancient tools changed our understanding of history.
discovery.exampleCn: 古代工具的发现改变了我们对历史的理解。

disbelief.example: She stared at him in disbelief when he told the truth.
disbelief.exampleCn: 当他说出真相时，她难以置信地盯着他。

burn.example: The candles burn brightly during the traditional festival.
burn.exampleCn: 传统节日期间，蜡烛明亮地燃烧着。

west.example: The sun sets in the west, painting the sky in beautiful colors.
west.exampleCn: 太阳从西边落下，把天空染成美丽的颜色。

market.example: The morning market is full of fresh vegetables and friendly faces.
market.exampleCn: 早市上满是新鲜蔬菜和朋友般的面孔。
